name: Nebius AI (European GPU Cloud)
pricing_notes: Usage-based GPU compute; H100/A100/H200; Yandex spin-off with EU/US presence

auth.notes: Nebius API key; OpenAI-compatible API endpoint

performance.notes: H100/H200 clusters; competitive with Lambda Labs and CoreWeave

agent_readiness.notes: OpenAI-compatible inference API (drop-in replacement). Nebius AI Studio for hosted models (Llama, Qwen, Mistral, etc.). GPU clusters for training (H100 SXM, H200, A100). Kubernetes-based managed ML platform. EU-based (Amsterdam/Finland) for GDPR compliance. Yandex spin-off; significant H100 capacity. Competitive pricing vs CoreWeave. OpenAI SDK compatible: base_url='https://api.studio.nebius.ai/v1'

gotchas: EU-centric — latency may be higher for US-only teams
Less name recognition than CoreWeave/Lambda Labs
best_when: EU GDPR compliance requirements for GPU compute
OpenAI-compatible inference on open models (Llama, Qwen, Mistral)
H100/H200 training workloads at competitive pricing
European teams wanting EU-based GPU cloud
avoid_when: US-only latency-sensitive inference (Lambda Labs or CoreWeave closer)
Managed Kubernetes preferred over raw GPU compute
summary: Nebius AI provides EU-based GPU cloud (H100/H200/A100) and OpenAI-compatible inference API. Drop-in with OpenAI SDK: base_url='https://api.studio.nebius.ai/v1'. Hosted open models (Llama, Qwen, Mistral). EU GDPR compliance. Yandex spin-off with competitive H100 pricing. Alternative to CoreWeave/Lambda Labs for European teams.
